text:
set of three files types (entity, provider, beneficiary) included for each model. A Beneficiary is someone who is entitled to health services under a federal health insurance plan. A Beneficiary is associated with an Entity and is not tied to a specific Provider, but rather to the set of providers in an entity group.

What does this file include? (variable highlights)
Model ID (with which the Beneficiary is associated)
Entity ID (with which the Beneficiary is associated)
CCW Beneficiary
